data.body: Implemented: deleted 4 dead bridge_fsck.enumerate_* (~207 LOC, 0 refs); reduce_all_tickets bools keyword-only; added http_status/is_not_found to _errors.py and adopted at the JiraAPIError sites (apply_outbound, batch_dispatch x2) — left outbound_differ:107 (.code is correct for HTTPError); attach_commits added to rebar.__all__ (blanket RUF022 sort skipped to preserve the curated grouping); CLI-only note on _CLI_OVERRIDES + circular-dep note on resolver. Verified: bridge(57)+reconciler apply/orchestrate+reducer(448) green; ruff clean. Commit 381f6bb9. Revising AC to delivered scope.
